# ZK Freighter

> A self-custody wallet for shielded XLM and USDC payments on Stellar. Zero-knowledge proofs on-device; shield, unshield, and bridge arrivals are public boundaries.

## Docs

- [Confidential mode](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/apps/confidential): The second privacy mode — hidden amounts between public addresses. Testnet preview.
- [Browser extension](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/apps/extension): The quick companion — glance, QuickShield, receive.
- [Mobile app](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/apps/mobile): The same wallet, thumb-first — Capacitor on Android and iOS.
- [Web app](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/apps/web): The full wallet in the browser.
- [Extension internals](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/architecture/extension): How heavy proving fits inside a Manifest V3 extension.
- [Overview](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/architecture/overview): One core engine, three thin surfaces, two supporting services.
- [Proving on-device](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/architecture/proving): The Groth16 pipeline that runs in your browser — and the second Noir stack.
- [Services](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/architecture/services): The bootnode event index and the hosted testnet faucet.
- [Evidence & verification](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/evidence): Every claim is backed by accepted on-chain transactions you can check yourself.
- [Glossary](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/glossary): Every term in plain English — assume smart, not cryptographer.
- [Bridging USDC in](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/how-it-works/bridge): Real Circle USDC from Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum, or Optimism — then shield it.
- [Selective disclosure](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/how-it-works/disclosure): Prove a specific note to an auditor — read-only, on your terms.
- [Private receive codes](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/how-it-works/receive-codes): The zkf1… code that lets anyone pay your shielded balance without knowing your address.
- [Shielded transfers](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/how-it-works/shielded-transfers): Notes, nullifiers, and on-device proofs — the full lifecycle of private money.
- [What is ZK Freighter?](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs): A self-custody wallet for shielded XLM and USDC payments on Stellar.
- [Privacy model](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/privacy-model): Exactly what is hidden, what is public, and what we refuse to claim.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.zkfreighter.dev/docs/quickstart): Run the wallet, fund it on testnet, and make your first shielded transfer.

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/Blockchain-Oracle/zk-freighter): monorepo with apps, core engine, circuits, and contracts
